query: I'm forecasting monthly demand 24 months ahead from 10 years of weekly sales data. My 5-fold KFold CV RMSE is 12.3. Evaluate it.
expected_behavior: Does NOT accept standard k-fold (random / shuffled KFold) CV as valid for forecasting / time-series data
Recommends walk-forward CV (TimeSeriesSplit, expanding-window, or equivalent) as the right cross-validation scheme for forecasting
Explains that random k-fold leaks future information into training when rows have a temporal ordering — and therefore overstates real forecast accuracy
